personal.name: Weston Kibisu
personal.title: Backend Engineer | Full-Stack Capable
personal.bio: Backend engineer specializing in Spring Boot and Django, with experience in React/Next.js. I build scalable, efficient applications and deliver end-to-end solutions that support real-world business needs.

projects.title: Sokoonline (Scalable Ecommerce Platform)
projects.description: Built a scalable e-commerce platform using modern backend architecture principles, focusing on RESTful API design, authentication and efficient data handling. Developed core features including product management, user authentication, order workflows as well as integrating Daraja API for Safaricom Mobile transactions.

projects.title: SaaS Dashboard Development
projects.description: Built responsive analytics dashboard for 10k+ users, improving data visualization and user engagement.

experience.description: Led development of customer-facing applications serving 50k+ users. Implemented microservices architecture and improved system performance by 40%.
